# digestweb.dev

> Daily curated web development news, hand-picked by FRSOURCE.

digestweb.dev publishes a daily selection of the most relevant web development
articles, tutorials, and announcements. Content covers CSS, JavaScript,
browser APIs, tooling, DX, and the broader web platform ecosystem.

## Feeds

- [RSS](https://digestweb.dev/feed.rss)
- [Atom](https://digestweb.dev/feed.atom)
- [JSON Feed](https://digestweb.dev/feed.json)

## Sitemap

- [sitemap.xml](https://digestweb.dev/sitemap.xml)

## About

Published by [FRSOURCE](https://frsource.org). Articles link to their
original sources; summaries and commentary are written by the FRSOURCE team.
